title: Pathseeker
description: A pack that I made for me and my friends! It'll probably be updated often as our tastes change and I develop scripts and whatnot.
body:
Welcome to Pathseeker! A modpack intended for use by me and my friends on a server of mine!

It's stylized around building community and automation using the Create mod (and others). It's likely going to be a work in progress for a long while as I'm switching from CraftTweaker to KubeJS, meaning I have to relearn a whole scripting framework, but it's not too bad so far.

The project currently features:
- Create 6.0 (+ addons)
- Computer Craft (+ addons)
- Hex Casting (+ addons)
- Truly Modular (+ addons)
- Tom's Simple Storage
- Applied Energistics 2 (AE2)
- LuckPerms (for server)
- Many structure mods
- And more

There are also modifications and additions using KubeJS:
- Nerfed AE2 automation
- The ability to feed villagers bread to heal them
- The ability to feed sculk catalysts your XP
- The ability to milk squids (like in older versions of the game)
- A progression system using advancements and gamestages

Future plans:
- Make an advancement tab for progression related advancements
- Add more scripts as user feedback comes in
- Make server pack downloadable

Known bugs:
- Some create recipes do not show in REI or EMI

FAQ:
(will be written when I get frequently asked questions)
